course.title: Computer Science
course.description: Introduction to programming and computer science

assignments.title: Python Basics
assignments.description: Variables, data types, conditionals, and loops

assignments.title: Python Classes
assignments.description: Defining and using classes in Python

assignments.title: Data Analysis
assignments.description: Basics of data analysis: loading, exploring, and visualizing data in Python.

assignments.title: Building REST APIs with FastAPI
assignments.description: Create scalable and efficient REST APIs using FastAPI with data validation and error handling.

assignments.title: Python Text Processing
assignments.description: Master string manipulation, file I/O operations, and text analysis with practical text processing techniques.

assignments.title: Data Structures in Python
assignments.description: Master lists, dictionaries, sets, and tuples to choose the right data structure for different problems.

assignments.title: Python Data Visualization
assignments.description: Master matplotlib and plotly to create professional, interactive data visualizations and communicate insights effectively.

assignments.title: Statistics with Python
assignments.description: Master statistical analysis and data manipulation with pandas and numpy to perform hypothesis testing and calculate probability distributions.
